name: Spinach & Lentil Soup (Santa Maria)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the washed spinach.
2. Boil the lentils in 4 cups of water with bay leaves until they are soft.
3. Heat olive oil in a pot and gently fry green onions for 2 minutes.
4. Add garlic and seasonings.
5. Incorporate spinach, mixing well.
6. Combine this mixture into the cooked lentils.
7. Add another pint of water or stock and cook for an additional 15 minutes.
